home.headline: No child should stop studying because of money
home.subhead: We provide financial support so needy students can continue their education. Aid is paid directly to the school after board review.
home.step1: Student or guardian submits an application with documents
home.step2: Board of directors researches and reviews the case
home.step3: If approved, the foundation contacts you and pays the school
home.inclusiveText: We support students from all backgrounds, including children with disabilities.
home.statusHint: Already applied? Check your application status with your reference number and CNIC.

about.title: About the foundation
about.p1: Al Sirat Ul Mustaqeem Foundation exists so that financial hardship does not end a child’s education.
about.p2: Applications are reviewed by our board. Approved aid is transferred directly to the student’s school—not as cash to families.
about.p3: Our motto: every child continues to study.

apply.title: Apply for educational aid
apply.intro: Fill this form carefully. Upload fee challan, B-Form, and income certificate.
apply.success: Application submitted successfully. Your reference number is {ref}. The foundation will contact you if approved.
apply.hasDisability: Does the student have a disability?
apply.declaration: I declare that the information is true. I understand aid is paid to the school if approved.

donate.title: Donate
donate.intro: Your contribution helps children stay in school. Use any method enabled below.
donate.empty: Donation details will appear here once the admin configures them.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Reach the foundation using the details below.
contact.empty: Contact details will appear here once the admin configures them.

status.title: Check application status
status.intro: Enter your reference number and CNIC to see the current status of your aid application.
status.approvedNote: The foundation will contact you for next steps. Aid is paid directly to your school.
